ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mouse */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the mouse */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the mouse (M for Male, F for Female) */,
  "sac_date" TEXT /* Date the mouse was sacrificed */,
  "demographic_group" TEXT /* Demographic group of the mouse */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain of the mouse */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the mouse */,
  "age_at_sacrifice" INTEGER /* Age of the mouse at sacrifice in weeks */,
  "weight_at_sacrifice" TEXT /* Weight of the mouse at sacrifice in grams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject (mouse) ID */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group classification of the subject (e.g., age group, strain) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic context */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the subject (e.g., juvenile, adult) */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet provided to the subject (e.g., standard, high-fat) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions of the subject (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical observation */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject (mouse) ID */,
  "clinical_indicator" TEXT /* Clinical indicator being assessed (e.g., partial inflation) */,
  "indicator_value" TEXT /* Value of the clinical indicator */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the observation was recorded */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the observation */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_observations_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the study objectives */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., observational, experimental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_subjects" (
  "study_subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the study-subject relationship */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study ID */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject (mouse) ID */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the subject was enrolled in the study */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date the subject was withdrawn from the study */,
  "withdrawal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for withdrawal (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_subjects_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_subjects_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Description of the data viewed */,
  "actions_performed" TEXT /* Description of actions performed (e.g., data edited, new data added) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study ID */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject (mouse) ID */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data changed (e.g., demographic, clinical) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study ID */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject (mouse) ID */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study ID */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject (mouse) ID */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental condition */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study ID */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_conditions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
